cantrip-tome.name: Cantrip Tome
cantrip-tome.description: A slim spellbook carried in the off-hand by hedge mages.

rune-grimoire.name: Rune Grimoire
rune-grimoire.description: A chained grimoire whose iron clasps hum with warding power.

drake-scale.name: Drake Scale Shield
drake-scale.description: Scale of a young drake, fashioned into a shield.

drakescript-codex.name: Drakescript Codex
drakescript-codex.description: A lacquered codex inked with fireproof draconic formulas.

fletcher-quiver.name: Fletcher Quiver
fletcher-quiver.description: An offhand quiver balanced for quick draws and steady footing.

barbed-quiver.name: Barbed Quiver
barbed-quiver.description: An offhand arrow-rig packed with hooked shafts for brutal volleys.

stormfeather-quiver.name: Stormfeather Quiver
stormfeather-quiver.description: A griffon-feather quiver that turns motion into relentless pressure.

tower-heater.name: Tower Heater
tower-heater.description: A broad iron-rimmed shield built to hold a line under arrow fire.

bulwark-aegis.name: Bulwark Aegis
bulwark-aegis.description: A fortress of a shield whose weight feels lighter in a hero's grasp.

smoke-pouch.name: Smoke Pouch
smoke-pouch.description: An offhand satchel of soot bombs and sleight-of-hand tricks.

poison-kit-satchel.name: Poison Kit Satchel
poison-kit-satchel.description: An offhand satchel of venoms, wire, and razor tools.

assassin-kit.name: Assassin Kit
assassin-kit.description: A lacquered wrist-rig of vials, picks, and throwing needles.

scripture.name: Pocket Scripture
scripture.description: An offhand prayerbook carried by ministers, healers, and exorcists.

reliquary.name: Reliquary
reliquary.description: A bronze reliquary box carried offhand, warm with old blessings.

gospel-codex.name: Gospel Codex
gospel-codex.description: A weighty offhand tome whose illuminated pages flare against corruption.

aegis-of-the-fallen.name: Aegis of the Fallen
aegis-of-the-fallen.description: A shield bearing the names of every soldier who died holding the line.

grimoire-of-stars.name: Grimoire of Stars
grimoire-of-stars.description: A tome of celestial spells that shields the mind from harm.

quiver-of-whispers.name: Quiver of Whispers
quiver-of-whispers.description: Each arrow drawn from this quiver carries a murmured hex.

shroud-of-knives.name: Shroud of Knives
shroud-of-knives.description: A bandolier of concealed blades that parries as well as any shield.

sacred-codex.name: Sacred Codex
sacred-codex.description: A holy codex that projects divine barriers when opened.

living-bulwark.name: Living Bulwark
living-bulwark.description: A shield of living wood that grows thorns and heals its own cracks.

glacial-bulwark.name: Glacial Bulwark
glacial-bulwark.description: A shield of solid glacial ice reinforced with permafrost ore.

frostguard-aegis.name: Frostguard Aegis
frostguard-aegis.description: A massive shield of permafrost and drake bone. The cold itself defends you.

obsidian-aegis.name: Obsidian Aegis
obsidian-aegis.description: A shield of volcanic glass. Shatters blades on impact.

omega-bulwark.name: Omega Bulwark
omega-bulwark.description: A shield made from omega construct plating. The last defense.
